questions.text: The human body has a skeleton. Complete the diagram by labelling the bones of the human body. [cite: 2, 3]
Muscles work in pairs to move bones. Tick one box that describes how muscles move bones in the body. [cite: 8, 9]
options: one muscle contracts and the other muscle relaxes [cite: 10]
one muscle stretches and the other muscle relaxes [cite: 11]
both muscles contract at the same time [cite: 12]
both muscles relax at the same time [cite: 13]
questions.correctAnswer: one muscle contracts and the other muscle relaxes [cite: 171]

questions.text: Moving the body regularly benefits our health. One benefit is a stronger heart. Suggest one other health benefit of moving the body. [cite: 15, 16]
Complete the sentences about this volcano. Liquid rock is found below ground in the ______. When the volcano erupts lava flows out of the secondary cone and out of the ______. [cite: 24, 26, 27]
Volcanoes are found at breaks in the Earth’s crust. What word describes the sudden movement of the Earth’s crust? [cite: 29, 30]
The particle model is used to explain the properties of solids and liquids. Draw a line from each property to its correct explanation. [cite: 32, 33]

pairs.property: liquids take the shape of the container they are in [cite: 34]
pairs.explanation: particles move around in all directions [cite: 173]

pairs.property: liquids and solids cannot be squashed [cite: 37, 38]

questions.text: Some solids behave like liquids. Which solid flows like a liquid? [cite: 44, 45]

The lamp is a light source. Complete the sentences to describe how we see an object that is not a light source. We see the object because light ______ off the surface of the object into our eyes. [cite: 58, 59, 60, 61]

headers: time taken to melt in minutes/min [cite: 75, 175]

correctData.method: in a beaker without salt or water [cite: 75]

questions.text: Complete the conclusion for this investigation. The fastest way to melt an ice cube is to ______. [cite: 77, 78]
Water turns to ice when it freezes. Which word describes freezing? [cite: 80, 81]

Look at the food chain. Complete the sentences about this food chain. The producer is the ______. The herbivore is the ______. The snake eats the ______. The mongoose is a predator and a ______. [cite: 84, 91, 92, 93]
Mike finds this identification key on the internet. Which bird in the key has a bent beak? [cite: 96, 114]
Write down one way the great egret is different to the snowy egret. Use the key to help you. [cite: 116, 117]
questions.correctAnswer: has legs longer than its body [cite: 178]

questions.text: Mike sees this bird flying near the water. Use the key to identify this bird. [cite: 119, 120]
Mike also sees this bird. The bird has a beak suited to help it feed in the habitat where it lives. Tick one box that describes how the bird feeds. [cite: 122, 123, 124]
options: uses its beak to pick up seeds from the ground [cite: 126]
uses it beak to pull insects from the mud [cite: 127]
uses its beak to scoop up large fish into its mouth [cite: 128]
uses its beak to pull plants from the water [cite: 129]
questions.correctAnswer: uses its beak to scoop up large fish into its mouth [cite: 178]

questions.text: This question is about energy. Which type of energy is transferred from a loud speaker to your ears? [cite: 131, 132]
